pi_items.source: setup_task.sh downloading https://files.rcsb.org/download/4INS.pdb and task description.
export_result.sh and verifier.py explicit path checks.
export_result.sh, verifier.py, and setup_task.sh explicit path checks.
export_result.sh, verifier.py, and setup_task.sh explicit path checks.
verifier.py checks for fig_size >= min_fig_size (30000 bytes).
verifier.py uses 80.0 as lower bound for 'a' unit cell dimension. 4INS PDB CRYST1 record has a=82.5.
verifier.py uses 85.0 as upper bound for 'a' unit cell dimension. 4INS PDB CRYST1 record has a=82.5.
verifier.py uses 32.0 as lower bound for 'c' unit cell dimension. 4INS PDB CRYST1 record has c=34.0.
verifier.py uses 36.0 as upper bound for 'c' unit cell dimension. 4INS PDB CRYST1 record has c=34.0.
verifier.py logic explicitly checks len(valid_res) >= min_contacts (5).
4INS PDB file SEQRES records show maximum chain length (Chains B and D) is 30 residues. verifier.py uses this as the upper limit for valid residue numbers.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real PDB data for porcine insulin (4INS). The actual unit cell dimensions from the PDB CRYST1 record are a=b=82.5 Å and c=34.0 Å, which perfectly fall within the target validation bounds (80-85 and 32-36 respectively). The maximum chain length of 30 residues accurately matches the SEQRES records for chains B and D. All target file paths and thresholds exactly match the export and verifier scripts.
